channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Charlie Kirk murder suspect changed clothes before shooting, agent testifies
item.description: An investigator testified that video shows Tyler Robinson climbing onto a rooftop and running to a spot overlooking the scene.

item.title: Midtown Manhattan building faces partial collapse risk after beams buckle
item.description: Several Manhattan buildings were evacuated Tuesday after construction workers found structural issues in an office building.

item.title: Satellites designed to detect wildfires aim to spot destructive blazes from orbit
item.description: FireSat satellites, using specialized cameras and imaging software, help detect wildfires from space, according to Muon Space CEO Jonny Dyer.

item.title: US support for Israel declines as Democrats grow more critical, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll shows a significant drop in support for Israel after decades of bipartisan backing.
